title: HOMESCAPES Set of 3 Artificial Single Stem Carnation Flowers 55 cm Tall Faux Silk Carnation Sprays for Bouquet or Floral Arrangement
features: Set of 3 luxury long-stemmed artificial Carnations for bouquets and more. Each stem measures approximately 55cm in Length. Colour: Green, Pink, White.
A vibrant and colourful artificial stem set, these stems of foliage can be paired with our range of single-stem artificial plants to create custom bouquets, arrangements or garlands for any event.
Crafted from a durable polyester, the petals look and feel real and lifelike. Perfect for decorating and DIYing your home or venue.

Carefully handcrafted by skilled experts, Homescapes’ artificial plants look just as good as real flowers and plants. Easy to maintain, simply wipe away dust or dirt with a soft cloth and keep out of direct sunlight.
Homescapes are a leading manufacturer of artificial plants, trees and flowers for the home and office. Choose from a wide selection of flowers and plants to add floral decoration to your home.
description: Silk-like polyester Carnation stem set by Homescapes. Crafted in a range of vibrant colours and made to be botanically correct, these faux flowers have a wide range of uses. Shop the single stem artificial range and DIY custom bouquets, floral arrangements, centrepieces, garlands and more in a style that suits you. Suitable for birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, christenings, funerals, gifts, or even just every day decor, these long lasting stems can be reused time and time again as needed. Equipped with a luxuriously long stem, so the height can be adjusted as needed. Set of 3 provided.
